metadata.description: Primary references for documentation coverage, contracts, AI-assisted audits, documentation quality gates, and large codebase workflows.

contracts_and_schemas.name: OpenAPI Specification (Latest)
contracts_and_schemas.description: Industry standard for REST API contracts; use for shift-left validation and docs-as-tests.

contracts_and_schemas.name: JSON Schema
contracts_and_schemas.description: Schema standard for payload documentation and validation.

documentation_frameworks.name: Diataxis Framework
documentation_frameworks.description: Docs structure model (tutorial/how-to/reference/explanation) for reducing doc debt and improving usability.

documentation_frameworks.name: The Good Docs Project
documentation_frameworks.description: Templates and best practices for documentation workflows.

documentation_frameworks.name: Write the Docs - Guide
documentation_frameworks.description: Community guide for documentation practices and workflows.

documentation_quality_gates.name: Vale
documentation_quality_gates.description: Prose linter for documentation quality checks in CI.

documentation_quality_gates.name: markdown-link-check
documentation_quality_gates.description: Broken link checking for Markdown files.

documentation_quality_gates.name: Spectral
documentation_quality_gates.description: OpenAPI and AsyncAPI linting with custom rulesets for CI enforcement.

api_coverage_tools.name: Swagger Coverage
api_coverage_tools.description: OpenAPI specification coverage tool - tracks which endpoints are tested vs documented.

api_coverage_tools.name: OpenAPI Coverage
api_coverage_tools.description: Reports documented and executed parts of OpenAPI spec under test.

api_coverage_tools.name: AsyncAPI Studio
api_coverage_tools.description: Visual editor and validator for AsyncAPI documents.

ai_documentation_tools.name: Mintlify
ai_documentation_tools.description: AI-powered documentation platform with GitHub integration and docs-as-code workflow.

ai_documentation_tools.name: DocuWriter.ai
ai_documentation_tools.description: Automated code documentation generation with n8n integration for CI/CD workflows.

ai_documentation_tools.name: Documentation.AI
ai_documentation_tools.description: AI documentation agent with MCP server support for agent-driven updates.

optional_governance.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
optional_governance.description: Optional governance baseline when using AI to draft or update documentation.

optional_governance.name: Model Context Protocol
optional_governance.description: MCP servers for connecting AI agents to live documentation context.

large_codebase_workflows.name: OpenAI AGENTS.md Guide
large_codebase_workflows.description: Official OpenAI Codex documentation for AGENTS.md cross-platform standard.

large_codebase_workflows.name: OpenAI Codex Config Advanced
large_codebase_workflows.description: Advanced configuration for OpenAI Codex including file size limits and directory structure.

large_codebase_workflows.name: Anthropic: Claude Code Best Practices
large_codebase_workflows.description: Official Anthropic best practices for Claude Code including large codebase strategies.

large_codebase_workflows.name: Anthropic: Claude Code Memory Documentation
large_codebase_workflows.description: Official documentation for CLAUDE.md file format and hierarchical loading.
